title: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth
overview: Category: Equity - Mid Cap. Risk Description: Moderately High risk. NAV: 230.395 (as of 06-Jul-2026). AUM: ₹97350.4842 Cr. Launch Date: 01-Jan-2013.

minimum_investment: Minimum SIP Investment: ₹100. Minimum Additional Investment: ₹100.
benchmark: Benchmark: NIFTY Midcap 150 Total Return Index

fund_management.name: Chirag Setalvad
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Setalvad is a B. Sc and MBA from University of North Carolina.. Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC he has worked with New Vernon Advisory Services Ltd., HDFC AMC and ING Barings N.V.

fund_management.name: Dhruv Muchhal
fund_management.bio: Education: Mr. Dhruv has done B.Com, CA and CFA. Experience: Prior to joining HDFC MF,he has worked with Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd., Goldman Sachs, CRISIL Global Research & Analytics and Deloitte Haskins & Sells
